title: Hobbies and free time
explanation:
Hobbies and free time

  • activities: photography, gardening, cooking, hiking, knitting
  • places: gym, cinema, theatre, museum
  • verbs: collect, join, practise, relax

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: She enjoys ____ in the countryside. | *hiking | gardening | collect
He ____ stamps from different countries. | *collects | joins | relaxes
We went to the ____ to see a new film. | *cinema | gym | museum
I ____ the guitar twice a week. | *practise | collect | hiking

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Her hobby is ____. She takes pictures of nature. | photography
I like to ____ with a good book. | relax
He wants to ____ a chess club. | join

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: They went to the ____ to watch a play. | *theatre | gym | hiking
I go to the ____ three times a week. | *gym | museum | theatre
____ is my favourite hobby — I love making pasta. | *Cooking | Joining | Collecting
In my free time I like to ____. | *draw | join | gym
